recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part I: Origins
recommendations.overview: In 1868, after the Bakumatsu war ends, the ex-assassin Kenshin Himura traverses Japan with an inverted sword, to defend the needy without killing.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends
recommendations.overview: Shishio sets sail in his ironclad ship to bring down the government. In order to stop him, Kenshin trains with his old master to learn his final technique.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: Before he was a protector, Kenshin was a fearsome assassin known as Battosai. But when he meets gentle Tomoe Yukishiro, a beautiful young woman who carries a huge burden in her heart, his life will change forever.

recommendations.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part II: Kyoto Inferno
recommendations.overview: Kenshin has settled into his new life with Kaoru and his other friends when he is approached with a request from the Meiji government. Makoto Shishio, a former assassin like Kenshin, was betrayed, set on fire and left for dead. He survived, and is no

recommendations.title: The Count of Monte Cristo
recommendations.overview: Edmond Dantés's life and plans to marry the beautiful Mercedes are shattered when his best friend, Fernand, deceives him. After spending 13 miserable years in prison, Dantés escapes with the help of a fellow inmate and plots his revenge, cleverly ins

recommendations.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after defeating the Galactic Empire, Han Solo and his allies face a new threat from the evil Kylo Ren and his army of Stormtroopers.

recommendations.title: Counterattack
recommendations.overview: When a hostage rescue mission creates a new enemy, Capt. Guerrero and his elite soldiers must face an ambush by a criminal group.

recommendations.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Action
recommendations.overview: A fanboy of a supervillain supergroup known as the Vicious 6, Gru hatches a plan to become evil enough to join them, with the backup of his followers, the Minions.

recommendations.title: F9
recommendations.overview: Dominic Toretto and his crew battle the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they've ever encountered: his forsaken brother.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: A Call to Arms
recommendations.overview: Allies of the Shadows seek revenge against humanity. This movie sets up the series, "Crusade," the sequel to "Babylon 5."
